title: P3 Data Roadmap Methodology
summary: P3's signature engagement: a 4-6 week assessment that maps a client's current data estate, identifies value-generating use cases, and produces a phased delivery roadmap.
content:
P3 Data Roadmap Methodology

The Data Roadmap is P3's flagship advisory engagement, designed to anchor a multi-year data modernization journey in concrete, ROI-justified milestones.

Phases

  1. Discovery (week 1-2): stakeholder interviews, data source inventory, current-state architecture diagram, pain-point catalog.
  2. Use Case Workshop (week 3): facilitated session to surface 10-20 candidate use cases, scored on impact x effort.
  3. Architecture Design (week 3-4): target-state diagram (Fabric-first or Azure-native), tooling decisions, governance model.
  4. Roadmap & Estimation (week 4-5): phased delivery plan, T-shirt sized estimates, dependencies map.
  5. Executive Readout (week 6): 1-hour board-ready presentation with prioritized roadmap and Q1-Q4 plan.

Deliverables

  • Current-state architecture diagram
  • Use case backlog (Excel + Asana)
  • Target-state architecture (Fabric / Azure / Power BI)
  • Roadmap deck (12-15 slides)
  • Estimation worksheet
author: P3 Advisory Practice

title: P3 AI Readiness Assessment
summary: A structured evaluation of a client's data, security, governance, and culture posture against the prerequisites for production AI workloads (Copilot, custom agents, RAG).
content:
P3 AI Readiness Assessment

Before deploying Copilot or building custom AI workloads, organizations must clear a readiness bar across five dimensions. P3's assessment scores each on a 1-5 maturity scale and produces a remediation plan.

Five Pillars

  1. Data Foundation: source-of-truth identification, lineage tracking, quality SLAs, master data management.
  2. Security & Compliance: sensitivity labeling (Purview), DLP policies, conditional access, tenant isolation review.
  3. Governance: data ownership model, certification process, lifecycle policies, ROT (redundant/obsolete/trivial) cleanup.
  4. Identity & Access: AAD hygiene, group-based RBAC, RLS/OLS readiness, B2B partner access patterns.
  5. Culture & Change: AI literacy training plan, champion network, success metrics, communication cadence.

Output

Heatmap deck + 90-day remediation backlog + executive briefing.
author: P3 AI Practice

title: P3 Rapid MVP Delivery
summary: P3's 6-8 week fixed-scope MVP pattern: working report or AI agent in production, with handoff documentation and a run book, on a milestone-payment cadence.
content:
P3 Rapid MVP Delivery

For clients who want proof, not slides, P3 runs Rapid MVPs: a small, focused build that ships to production in 6-8 weeks. Common shapes: a Power BI report on a real data source, a Copilot Studio agent, a custom MCP-backed LibreChat agent, or a translytical task flow.

Cadence

  • Week 1: kickoff, scope lock, environment access (dev tenant or sandbox subscription).
  • Week 2-5: build sprints, weekly demo, async Slack/Teams loop.
  • Week 6: UAT, perf tuning, security review.
  • Week 7-8: production deploy, runbook authoring, knowledge transfer.

Pricing

Fixed-fee, milestone-billed (30/40/30). No T&M unless scope explicitly expands.

Deliverables

Working solution + source code (client-owned) + runbook + 30-day support window.
author: P3 Delivery Practice
